items.position: Peserta Esential Programming Course- Fullstack Web Development
description: Completed a Fullstack Web Development course focusing on modern web development technologies and software engineering practices.
Developed backend applications using Python, Flask, REST API, JSON, JWT authentication, cookies, and web scraping techniques.
Built frontend interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap, and Bulma, focusing on responsive and user-friendly design.
Designed UI prototypes using Figma and implemented version control workflows using Git.
Developed and maintained web applications using modern development tools such as Visual Studio Code.
Implemented MongoDB for database management and data handling.
Collaborated with UI/UX design concepts to implement client-side and server-side architecture effectively.
Performed testing and debugging to improve performance and ensure application reliability.
Develop and maintain full-stack web applications, integrating backend services with frontend interfaces using modern web technologies.
Implement version control workflows using Git to manage code collaboration and project development efficiently.
Apply UI/UX design principles, including layout, color, typography, and spacing to create intuitive and user-friendly interfaces.
Conduct user analysis and interaction flow design to improve overall user experience and usability.
Implement responsive design techniques using CSS and grid systems to ensure optimal performance across multiple devices and screen sizes.
Apply web accessibility practices to ensure applications are usable by a wide range of users.
Implement basic web security practices, including prevention of common attacks such as XSS, CSRF, and SQL Injection.
Apply data encryption techniques (DES) to protect sensitive user information and enhance application security.

items.company: Coding Camp powered by DBS Foundation
description: Completed a Fullstack Web Development training program, focusing on modern web development technologies such as Hapi.js and Webpack.
Performed independent learning and hands-on assignments for each learning module to strengthen practical development skills.
Developed a Capstone Project that applied fullstack concepts, integrating backend services and frontend implementation.
Improved soft skills and professional English communication to align with industry standards.
Prepared professional CV and career readiness skills to support transition into the technology industry.
Deliver coding courses both remotely (WFH) and on-site (WFO), including collaboration programs with Unity Technologies.
Design and develop structured curriculum, learning materials, and certification assessments.
Conduct structured teaching sessions based on the developed syllabus to maintain consistent and effective learning delivery.
Evaluate student performance and prepare progress reports to measure learning outcomes.
Continuously learn and update technical knowledge to provide high-quality instruction (Roblox Studio, Scratch, Alpine, Laravel).
Contribute to internal web development projects, collaborating with the technical team when needed.
Contributed to web development activities using Next.js, TanStack Query, Zod, Zustand, MongoDB, Docker, and GitLab.
Participated in development collaboration within the Salfok project, assisting in building and improving web application features.
Performed Quality Assurance testing for internal enterprise systems used by SAP.
Created Acceptance Criteria with AI-assisted analysis to ensure features met business and technical requirements.
Designed and executed test cases for various system modules to validate functionality.
Reported and tracked bugs using ClickUp and OpenProject.
Conducted API testing using Postman and performed manual testing across system modules.
Conduct in-depth consultations with clients to analyze business processes and translate user requirements into technical specifications.
Design and develop high-performance web applications using Spring Boot and MySQL for reliable data management.
Build responsive frontend interfaces using React.js, integrated with TanStack Query for efficient state management.
Prepare and deliver tailored technical training (knowledge transfer) to ensure effective system adoption.
